title: myoporum myoporoides
intro: Myoporum myoporoides, also known as Bois de Rose or Beach Ball, is a flowering plant native to Australia and the Pacific Islands. It is a shrub with fragrant, white or pink flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and acting as an antiseptic to soothe wounds and skin irritations. Myoporum myoporoides can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
